_comment: Authoritative list of CI checks that MUST pass before a PR can merge into main. GitHub branch protection is NOT in the tree, so this file is the source of truth and the `gate-guard` CI job (tools/check-required-checks.mjs) fails if branch protection drifts from it. NOTE: e2e runs as a 3-shard matrix reported as `e2e (1..3)`; the `e2e-required` fan-in job aggregates them into this one stable name — require e2e-required, NOT `e2e`. visual-smoke is intentionally informational (WebGL goldens are runner-sensitive) and is NOT listed here.
